title: EvidencePacket
description: Structured output schema for the Technical Expert role. Used with Codex CLI --output-schema for validated responses.

answer.description: The Technical Expert's answer to the question, grounded in workspace evidence.

evidence_references.description: References to evidence found in the workspace.

url.description: File path or URL of the evidence source.

relevance_score.description: Relevance score (0-1) of this evidence to the question.

confidence_level.description: Confidence level of the answer based on evidence quality.

caveats.description: Caveats or limitations of the answer.
